allow: PowerShell(if \(Test-Path "public\\logo.jpeg"\) { "FOUND: public\\logo.jpeg \($\(\(Get-Item 'public\\logo.jpeg'\).Length\) bytes\)" } else { "NOT FOUND: public\\logo.jpeg" }; if \(Test-Path "app\\public\\logo.jpeg"\) { "FOUND: app\\public\\logo.jpeg \($\(\(Get-Item 'app\\public\\logo.jpeg'\).Length\) bytes\)" } else { "NOT FOUND: app\\public\\logo.jpeg" })
